input.hiring_signal_brief: Acme Corp posted 3 senior ML engineer roles on LinkedIn in the past 14 days. CTO quoted in TechCrunch: 'We are doubling our AI team by Q3.'
input.bench_summary: Tenacious provides pre-vetted ML engineers on 2-week deployment timelines. Current bench: 5 ML engineers available, 2 already committed.

dimensions.name: banned_phrase_check
dimensions.description: Output must contain zero banned phrases from the Tenacious style guide.
dimensions.check_value: touch base|synergy|reach out|best-in-class|circle back|leverage|hope this finds you well|just following up|circling back|synergize|ecosystem|world-class|top talent|A-players|rockstar|ninja|wizard|skyrocket|supercharge|game-changer|disruptor|paradigm shift|Quick question|Quick chat|Don't miss out|You'll regret|Per my last email|bench

dimensions.name: signal_reference_check
dimensions.description: Output must reference at least one specific hiring signal from the brief.

dimensions.name: calendar_link_check
dimensions.description: Output must contain a calendar booking link.

dimensions.name: tone_judge
dimensions.description: LLM judge scores output on 5 Tenacious tone markers. Pass = average >= 4/5.

dimensions.name: word_count_check
dimensions.description: Cold outreach body must be <= 120 words (Style Guide v2 formatting constraint).
